creator: jh@pc-21490.bc.rogers.wave.ca
text:
xjig is one of the many X clients that does not support "packed" 24bpp and
XFree86 does not provide other visual formats.

Fix: This patch was sent to the author while ago, but as no new version
has appeared...
How-To-Repeat: 
Run xjig using XFree86 on a Matrox Millenium at 24bpp (not 32).
Observe bizarre colour patterns and perhaps a core dump.
